commit a1b2c3d4e5f6789012345678901234567890abcd
Author: Alice Johnson <alice@example.com>
Date:   Mon Jan 15 10:30:00 2024 -0800

    Add user authentication module

    Implements JWT-based authentication with refresh token support.
    Includes middleware for protected routes and session management.
    Follows OAuth 2.0 best practices for token handling.

commit b2c3d4e5f67890123456789012345678901bcde
Author: Bob Smith <bob@example.com>
Date:   Sun Jan 14 15:22:00 2024 -0800

    Fix null pointer exception in payment handler

    The payment handler was failing when user had no default payment card.
    Added proper null check before accessing card properties.
    Added unit tests to cover edge cases.

commit c3d4e5f6789012345678901234567890abcdef01
Author: Carol White <carol@example.com>
Date:   Fri Jan 12 09:15:00 2024 -0800

    Refactor database connection pooling

    Moved from single connection to a configurable connection pool for
    better performance under load. Pool size is configurable via DATABASE_POOL_SIZE
    environment variable. Default pool size is 10 connections.

commit d4e5f67890123456789012345678901234567890
Author: David Brown <david@example.com>
Date:   Thu Jan 11 16:45:00 2024 -0800

    Update dependencies to latest stable versions

    Updated the following dependencies:
    - Express: 4.18.1 -> 4.18.2
    - TypeScript: 5.1.0 -> 5.2.2
    - Prisma: 5.0.0 -> 5.1.1
    - Jest: 29.5.0 -> 29.7.0
    - eslint: 8.50.0 -> 8.55.0

commit e5f67890123456789012345678901234567890ab
Author: Eve Wilson <eve@example.com>
Date:   Wed Jan 10 11:30:00 2024 -0800

    Add comprehensive error logging and monitoring

    Integrated Winston logger with structured JSON output.
    Added request ID tracking for distributed tracing.
    Configured log levels per environment.

commit f67890123456789012345678901234567890abcd
Author: Frank Davis <frank@example.com>
Date:   Tue Jan 09 14:20:00 2024 -0800

    Implement rate limiting middleware

    Added express-rate-limit to prevent API abuse.
    Configured 100 requests per 15 minutes per IP address.
    Added custom error response for rate limit exceeded.

commit 7890123456789012345678901234567890abcde
Author: Grace Lee <grace@example.com>
Date:   Mon Jan 08 10:00:00 2024 -0800

    Add WebSocket support for real-time notifications

    Integrated Socket.io for bidirectional real-time communication.
    Users now receive instant updates for new messages, order status
    changes, and system notifications. Supports reconnection logic.

commit 890123456789012345678901234567890abcdef
Author: Henry Martinez <henry@example.com>
Date:   Sun Jan 07 17:30:00 2024 -0800

    Fix CORS configuration for production deployment

    Updated CORS configuration to only allow requests from approved domains.
    Added support for credentials in cross-origin requests.

commit 90123456789012345678901234567890abcdef0
Author: Iris Thompson <iris@example.com>
Date:   Sat Jan 06 12:45:00 2024 -0800

    Add pagination support to all list endpoints

    All list endpoints now support page and limit query parameters.
    Default page size is 20 items, maximum is 100 items.
    Added cursor-based pagination for large datasets.

commit 0123456789012345678901234567890abcdef01
Author: Jack Anderson <jack@example.com>
Date:   Fri Jan 05 09:30:00 2024 -0800

    Implement file upload with S3 integration

    Users can now upload profile pictures, documents, and attachments.
    Files are stored in AWS S3 with CloudFront CDN distribution.
    Added file type validation and size limits (max 10MB).

commit 123456789012345678901234567890abcdef012
Author: Kate Jackson <kate@example.com>
Date:   Thu Jan 04 15:00:00 2024 -0800

    Add email verification for new account registration

    New users must verify their email address before accessing the app.
    Verification email sent via SendGrid with 24-hour expiry link.

commit 23456789012345678901234567890abcdef0123
Author: Liam Harris <liam@example.com>
Date:   Wed Jan 03 11:15:00 2024 -0800

    Optimize database queries with composite indexes

    Added composite indexes to frequently queried column combinations.
    Analyzed slow query log to identify bottlenecks.
    Reduced average query time from 450ms to 23ms on main endpoints.

commit 3456789012345678901234567890abcdef01234
Author: Mia Clark <mia@example.com>
Date:   Tue Jan 02 16:30:00 2024 -0800

    Implement secure password reset via email

    Users can now request a password reset link via email.
    Reset tokens are cryptographically random, stored hashed.
    Tokens expire after 1 hour for security.

    New /admin route with charts showing key business metrics.
    Displays user growth, revenue trends, and error rates.
    Uses Chart.js for interactive visualizations.

    Integrate Stripe for payment processing

    Added Stripe checkout flow for subscription management.
    Supports credit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
    Handles webhooks for payment confirmation and refunds.

commit 6789012345678901234567890abcdef01234567
Author: Peter Walker <peter@example.com>
Date:   Sat Dec 30 11:30:00 2023 -0800

    Add multi-language support with i18n framework

    Implemented react-i18next for complete internationalization support.
    Currently supports English, Spanish, French, and German.
    Translation files managed via Crowdin integration.

commit 789012345678901234567890abcdef012345678
Author: Quinn Hall <quinn@example.com>
Date:   Fri Dec 29 09:45:00 2023 -0800

    Fix memory leak in WebSocket connection handler

    WebSocket connections were not being properly cleaned up on disconnect.
    Added proper cleanup in the disconnect handler.
    Fixed event listener accumulation over time.

commit 89012345678901234567890abcdef0123456789
Author: Rachel Young <rachel@example.com>
Date:   Thu Dec 28 16:00:00 2023 -0800

    Add dark mode support with user preference persistence

    Users can toggle between dark and light mode in settings.
    Preference stored in localStorage and synced to user profile.
    Respects system-level prefers-color-scheme media query.

commit 9012345678901234567890abcdef01234567890
Author: Sam Allen <sam@example.com>
Date:   Wed Dec 27 13:30:00 2023 -0800

    Improve mobile responsiveness across all pages

    Fixed layout issues on small screens and tablets.
    All components now work correctly on screens >= 320px wide.
    Added touch-friendly interaction for mobile users.

commit a012345678901234567890abcdef012345678901
Author: Tara Scott <tara@example.com>
Date:   Tue Dec 26 10:00:00 2023 -0800

    Set up project structure with TypeScript, Express.js, Prisma ORM,
    and Jest for testing. Includes ESLint and Prettier configuration.
    Docker setup for local development with PostgreSQL.
